features: CONTINUOUS FRESHNESS: The Febreze 3Volution plug in air freshener refills continuously fight odours and alternate between 3 complementary scents for noticeable freshness.
LONG-LASTING: These plug in air freshener refills last up to 90 days (if used 12h per day at low setting), making them a cost-effective choice for your home.
BOOSTED SCENT: Experience a boosted scent that travels further with the Febreze plug in refill 3Volution, fighting tough lingering pet odours and leaving a light fresh scent.
ODOURCLEAR TECHNOLOGY: The unique Febreze Odourclear technology in these 3Volution plug in refills doesn't just mask but truly fights odours, leaving a fresh scent.
WIDE RANGE OF FRAGRANCES: Febreze Plug In Air Fresheners for home are available in a wide range of high quality fragrances.
description: Product Description Febreze 3Volution Air Freshener Exotic Bloom continuously fights odours and alternates between 3 complementary scents for freshness you keep noticing. Lasts up to 90 days (if used 12h per day on low setting). Exotic Bloom fragrance is inspired by springtime natural freshness. Inspired by serene countryside, flowers and fruit-trees where blushes of peach blossom contrast with the floral brushstrokes of bewitching Rose de mai and Freesia. With traditional plugs, we get used to to scents quickly and stop noticing them. Febreze 3Volution renews the freshness by continously and automatically alternating between 3 complementary, high quality scents every 45 minutes. Use Febreze 3Volution refills with the 3Volution Electrical Diffuser to fill your home with freshness and fragrance that you will keep noticing day after day, week after week. 3Volution also lets you adjust the level of scent, helping you to create the ambiance that you want, when you want. Ingredients Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Benzyl Salicylate, Hydroxycitronellal, Pentamethylheptenone, Dihydromyrcene, Limonene, Ethyl 2, 2-Dimethylhydrocinnamal, Citral, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Geraniol, Tetrahydrolinalool, Hexyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Cyclamen Aldehyde, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, 2, 4-Dimethyl-3-Cyclohexene Carboxaldehyde, Dimethyl Heptenal, Dimethylcyclohexenyl 3-Butenyl Ketone, Coumarin, Beta-Pinene, 3-(P-Cumenyl)Propionaldehyde, Isoeugenol, Delta-Damascone, Methyl 2-Octynoate, Nerol Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
